sections.paragraph: m. stained, spotted, having spots or stains (from the root בָּלַל No. 2), only found Levit. 21:20 , תְּבַלֻּל בְּעֵינֹו Vulg. albuginem habens in oculo. Vers. anon. in the Hexapla, λεύκωμα, compare Tob_2:9 3:17 6:8 (where the Hebrew interpreter has rendered the Gr. λεύκωμα by this word). Targg. snail, here used for blear-eyed (see the root בָּלַל No. 1 ).
